About Me

Turning Data
Into Decisions

I hold a B.Sc. in Economics with a minor in Political Science from the Faculty of Economics & Political Science, Alexandria University. This interdisciplinary background gives me a strong analytical foundation — combining quantitative economic reasoning with a broader understanding of policy and governance.

My approach bridges rigorous analysis with clear communication — because the best insight means nothing if it can't be understood and acted upon.

Available for new opportunities.

Portfolio

Featured
Projects

01
Amazon Global Sales Analysis
Built a structured star schema (Fact + Dimension tables) from a single flat file, then developed an interactive 2-page Power BI report analyzing Amazon's global sales across 2010–2017.

$143M total sales  ·  Cosmetics #1 category  ·  Offline leads at $85M
Power BI DAX Power Query Data Modeling Star Schema Excel
02
HR Analytics Dashboard
Transformed a flat HR dataset into a clean Star Schema (Fact + Dimension tables), wrote DAX measures, and built an interactive Power BI dashboard to answer: "What are the key drivers of employee attrition, and which employee segments are at highest risk of leaving?"

16.1% attrition rate  ·  Overtime staff 3x more likely to leave  ·  Entry-level at 26.3% risk  ·  Sales dept highest attrition (20.6%)
Power BI DAX Power Query Data Modeling Star Schema Excel
03
Adidas Sales Analytics Dashboard
Used SQL to clean and prepare the raw sales data, then built a 2-page interactive Power BI report analyzing Adidas's global sales performance across 2020-2021, with drill-through from top-level KPIs into detailed breakdowns by product, region, retailer, and sales channel.

$899.9M total sales  ·  294% YoY sales growth (2020 → 2021)  ·  Men's Street Footwear top product (23.2%)
SQL Power BI DAX Power Query Data Modeling Drill-through
